should_trigger: bump kit version for the next skills-harness release
cut a harness release and update CHANGELOG
ship a new skills-harness version on main
bump harness version in AGENTS_skills.md for release
prepare a kit release before tagging vX.Y.Z
add a Keep a Changelog entry for the new kit version
should_not_trigger: write a new skill from scratch
export our skill to another repository
import a skill from another repo into _skills/
install skills-harness as a git subtree
detect skill conflicts in my IDE user config
audit the skill catalog for duplicate triggers
